steps.title: Set up the total earnings inequality
steps.content:
Total earnings = base salary $$x$$ + commission $$0.14s$$.
The goal requires total earnings be at least $$4x$$ and at most $$5x$$:
$$4x \le x + 0.14s \le 5x$$

steps.title: Isolate s
steps.content:
Subtract $$x$$ from all parts:
$$3x \le 0.14s \le 4x$$
Divide by $$0.14$$:
$$\frac{3}{0.14}x \le s \le \frac{4}{0.14}x$$

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘$3x \le s \le 4x$’: This would mean dividing by 1, not 0.14 - ignores the commission rate. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘$\frac{3}{0.14}x \le s \le \frac{4}{0.14}x$’: Matches exactly. ✓
  • Choice C — ‘$4x \le s \le 5x$’: Uses the original multipliers 4 and 5, not the reduced values 3 and 4 after subtracting x. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘$\frac{4}{0.14}x \le s \le \frac{5}{0.14}x$’: Uses 4 and 5 as numerators instead of 3 and 4 - does not subtract x first. ✗
That confirms B. — B is correct.
